breadcrumb.title: Review our focus areas and working model at a glance.
breadcrumb.desc: We present our brand, service and application based collaborations in a clearer structure.

intro.title: Reference value is built with the right product and a disciplined process.
intro.desc: The cards below summarize Set Otomotiv's focus areas and partnership categories.

items.title: Peugeot and Citroen Spare Parts
items.text: We work with model focused part identification, process follow-up and accurate product guidance.

items.title: Axalta and refinishing solutions
items.text: We provide paint solutions supported by color bank matching and application guidance.

items.title: Standox and Duxone product lines
items.text: We support product selection and process visibility for professional repair paint systems.

items.title: Industrial coating solutions
items.text: We plan suitable product groups for acrylic, epoxy and different industrial surfaces.

items.title: Care products and application support
items.text: We guide the right product selection and proper usage order for vehicle care workflows.

items.title: Long term partnership model
items.text: Our goal is not only sales, but also reliable communication and sustainable supply discipline.

cta.title: The references page can be strengthened further with project boxes, customer segments or a visual application gallery.
cta.desc: In the next step we can enrich this area with real brand logos, portfolio blocks and deeper category filtering.
